title: boerhavia coccinea
intro: Boerhavia coccinea, also known as red spiderling, is a perennial herb belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antidiabetic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boerhavia coccinea include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for use in herbal remedies, and can be consumed orally or used topically to treat various health conditions.
